inference_ledger.resolution: already raw fractions — no conversion applied
inference_ledger.rationale: all values <= 0.005 and mutually consistent with raw complaint-rate scale; per-1000 reading would imply absurd 0.0000005 true rates
inference_ledger.regulatory_basis: RACT O1-O5 occurrence thresholds (constraints/ract_occurrence_codes.json) compare raw rates

inference_ledger.resolution: IMDRF Annex A/F coding dictionary — reference material, NOT part of the locked POST /runs payload
inference_ledger.rationale: key names match IMDRF annex structure; /defaults input set does not include it
inference_ledger.regulatory_basis: IMDRF Annex A (device problem) / Annex F (health impact) terminologies

inference_ledger.item: device_model reconciliation: data 'Stapler-X100' vs device_context catalog numbers
inference_ledger.input_value: CSVs use device_model=Stapler-X100; device_context.model_or_catalog_numbers = [LSX100, LSX100-Reload, LSX100-Std]
inference_ledger.resolution: provisionally treated as the same device family (trade name matches exactly: Laparoscopic Stapler X100)
inference_ledger.rationale: device_name matches device_trade_names verbatim, but the model string in the CSVs matches no catalog number
inference_ledger.regulatory_basis: MDCG 2022-21 §Device identification — models covered by the PSUR must be unambiguous

inference_ledger.resolution: retained — external vigilance-database results for similar devices belong in Section K
inference_ledger.rationale: MDCG 2022-21 external-database review explicitly covers similar devices on the market
inference_ledger.regulatory_basis: MDCG 2022-21 Table 10 (external database searches, similar devices)

inference_ledger.input_value: bloc regions NorthAmerica/Europe/Asia in sales, complaints, fsca
inference_ledger.resolution: user chose: re-export all three files at country level (one country per row)
inference_ledger.regulatory_basis: MDCG 2022-21 regional tables (EEA+TR+XI vs UK vs Worldwide)

inference_ledger.input_value: previous PSUR end 2023-03-31 vs new period 2023-01-01..2023-12-31
inference_ledger.resolution: user chose: document a deviation — overlap is real; deviation justification + comparability statement for Jan–Mar 2023 to be typed by user (pending)
inference_ledger.rationale: user decision 2026-07-11; verbatim justification text still owed for D7/D10
inference_ledger.regulatory_basis: MDCG 2022-21 §data collection period (consecutive periods; deviations justified)

inference_ledger.input_value: UK rows: sales 12, complaints 6 — NI volume included
inference_ledger.resolution: user confirmed NI volume IS included and CAN be split — split figures/re-export pending
inference_ledger.rationale: user decision 2026-07-11; NI rows will be re-labelled Northern Ireland → EEA+TR+XI
inference_ledger.regulatory_basis: Windsor Framework — XI reports under EEA+TR+XI

inference_ledger.input_value: single-use stapler, deployed titanium staples remain in patient
inference_ledger.resolution: NOT implantable — stapler is the device under Rule 10; staples addressed in RMF/CER. Cadence annual (Class IIb regardless), UK MDR 44ZQ retention 10 years
inference_ledger.rationale: user decision 2026-07-11, consistent with stated Class IIb Rule 10 certification
inference_ledger.regulatory_basis: EU MDR Annex VIII Rule 10; UK MDR 2024 44ZM(6), 44ZQ

blockers_open: B1-REGION [remedy agreed, awaiting files]: user will re-export sales, complaints, fsca at country level (one country per row). Blocked until the re-exports arrive and pass the Region Gate (R3 confirm-table).

B2-NI-SPLIT [remedy agreed, awaiting figures]: NI volume IS included in the UK rows and CAN be split — awaiting the NI/GB split (can arrive with the B1 re-export). NI rows -> Northern Ireland -> EEA+TR+XI.

B3-D7-CONTIGUITY [deviation route agreed, awaiting text]: user chose to document a deviation. Awaiting the user's verbatim deviation justification + comparability statement covering the Jan–Mar 2023 overlap with PSUR001.

B4-CONFIRMATIONS-REMAINING: (1) single-use => every rate computed against units sold — read-back not yet confirmed; (2) Class IIb Rule 10 => annual PSUR — read-back not yet confirmed; (4) UK trio read-back (all three filled; consistent with UK sales); (5) legacy status (CE 2015 — MDR-certified via BSI NL 2797, or legacy MDD?). [(3) implantable RESOLVED: not implantable — ledger #8]

B5-DECLARATIONS: D2 counting criterion, D3 population exposure, D4 four-year history, D6 cover-page identity (SRN, legal manufacturer, EU AR, PSUR reference number, version), D8 action statuses, D9 CAPA scope.
